intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: *yawns* {callerName} from {callerLocation}. What's going on at your place?

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: We moved into an old Victorian six months ago. Something's in there with us.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: What kind of something?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Footsteps upstairs when no one's there. Doors opening on their own. Cold spots that move.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Old houses settle. Could be drafts.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: I thought so too. Until my daughter started talking to someone named Margaret. There's no Margaret.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Kids have imaginary friends. Doesn't mean anything.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: She described an old woman in a blue dress. Previous owner died in that house. Her name was Margaret.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Children are sensitive to these things. More than adults.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: That's what scares me. She's not afraid of it. But I am.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Keep an eye on things. Thanks for calling.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Thanks, Vern. Needed to tell someone who wouldn't laugh.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Our house. Six months since we moved in. Something else lives there.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: What makes you say that?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Footsteps. Doors. Cold spots. My kid talks to someone who isn't there.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Name?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Margaret. Looked it up. Previous owner. Died in the house twenty years ago.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Maybe the kid heard the name somewhere. Neighbors talk.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: She described what Margaret was wearing. We found a photo later. It matched.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: At least it seems peaceful. Some hauntings aren't.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: For now. But it's getting more active.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: We've got {callerName} on the line from {callerLocation}. Tell us about your house.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern, my family moved into an old Victorian six months ago. I don't think we're alone in there.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: What's been happening? Walk me through it.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Started small. Footsteps upstairs when everyone's downstairs. Doors that open on their own. Cold spots that seem to move through rooms.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Old houses do strange things. Could be the structure settling.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: That's what I told myself. Then my seven-year-old started having conversations with someone named Margaret. We don't know anyone named Margaret.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Kids invent imaginary friends all the time. Could be coincidence.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: She described an elderly woman in a blue dress. I found an obituary - previous owner, died in the house. Name was Margaret. Blue was her favorite color.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Children see things we've learned to block out. It's documented.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: She's not scared of her. Says Margaret is nice. That almost makes it worse.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Document everything. Dates, times, what happens. It helps establish patterns.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Good idea. Thank you for listening, Vern.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}, you're on. I hear you've got some activity at your place.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Six months in an old Victorian, Vern. Something's definitely there with us.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Tell me everything. What's been happening?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Footsteps upstairs when the whole family is downstairs. Doors opening by themselves. Cold spots that move through the rooms like something's walking.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Classic signs. Anything else? Any direct contact?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: My daughter talks to someone named Margaret. Describes her in detail. We found out the previous owner was named Margaret. She died in that house.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Could the daughter have learned about Margaret some other way? Neighbors, internet?

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: She's seven. She doesn't use the internet. And she described things we only confirmed later from old photos.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: The previous owner. She's attached to the house. That's textbook residual haunting.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: That's what I've been reading. She doesn't seem malicious. But it's still unsettling.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Keep a journal. Every incident, every detail. And call back if it escalates.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: I will. Thank you for taking this seriously, Vern.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: Folks, {callerName} from {callerLocation} says their house is HAUNTED! Tell us!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern, we moved into an old Victorian and something is IN THERE with us!

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: What's happening?! Give me the details!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Footsteps when no one's there! Doors flying open! Cold spots that MOVE through the house!

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Classic haunting signs! Anything else?!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: My daughter talks to someone named MARGARET! The previous owner! She DIED in that house!

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Wait - how did your daughter know about Margaret?! Did someone tell her?!

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: NO ONE told her! She described her perfectly! We found an old photo - it MATCHED!

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: The previous owner is STILL THERE! This is textbook residual haunting!

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I know! I didn't believe in this stuff before! I DO NOW!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Document EVERYTHING! Set up cameras! This could be incredible!
